codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review passed. Reviewed the worker handoff for commit 11f13b07, validated the reported scope and verification evidence, and checked the committed diff shape for the feature. Updated `erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/auth/AuthTenantAuthorityIT.java` so the broad auth-boundary suite matches the current production policy instead of stale assumptions. The HOLD/BLOCKED lifecycle coverage now asserts the controlled `TENANT_LIFECYCLE_RESTRICTED` denial contract for authenticated `/api/v1/auth/me` access, and the super-admin hierarchy sales-target case now asserts the `SUPER_ADMIN_PLATFORM_ONLY` fail-closed contract instead of expecting tenant workflow execution. Added a shared helper for controlled access-denied assertions; no runtime code, endpoints, DTOs, migrations, or request/response shapes changed.

summary: Pass. Realigned the stale full-class auth-boundary integration assertions with the already-delivered platform-only super-admin policy and current tenant lifecycle denial behavior. The packet stayed test-only, kept the auth/admin API shapes unchanged, and now verifies fail-closed HOLD/BLOCKED and super-admin tenant-workflow denials without widening any execution rights.
